zh.Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇
zh.Isreal: 烏干達諾特黑吉古姆易斯亞爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Andronic Doukas Angelos於1123年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾時，他的父親Constantine Angelos30歲，母親Theodōra Komnēnos27歲。他於大約1140年與Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1185年9月12日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇享年62歲，埋葬在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا。

zh-hans.Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇
zh-hans.Isreal: 乌干达諾特黑吉古姆易斯亞爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andronic Doukas Angelos于1123年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾时，他的父亲Constantine Angelos30岁，母亲Theodōra Komnēnos27岁。他于大约1140年与Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1185年9月12日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇享年62岁，埋葬在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا。

nameMeanings.name: Angelos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Spiro, Alexandros, Constantine, Manos, Nikolaos, Stavros, Vasilios.

American shortened form of Greek patronymics such as Angelopoulos , derived from the personal name Angelos, which is from angelos (in Greek transliteration aggelos) ‘messenger, angel’ or a short form of the personal name Euangelos ‘bringer of good news’ (see Evangelista ). Compare Angelis .

variants.name: Angelides
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ). The suffix -ides, meaning ‘son/descendant of’, is classical, and was revived in the 19th century, in particular by Greeks from Asia Minor and Eastern Thrace.

variants.name: Angelopoulos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Andreas, Dimitrios, Angelos, Athanasia, Kostas, Nikolaos, Pericles, Spyridon, Spyros, Thanos, Vassilis.
Greek: patronymic from the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ) + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese.

variants.name: Angelakis
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ) + the diminutive suffix -akis, which is particularly typical for the surnames from Crete, where it was adopted massively in the 19th century.

variants.name: Angelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Konstantinos, Antonios, Athina, Christos, Dimitrios, Efthimios, Eleftherios, Georgios, Konstantino, Sevasti, Stratis.  Italian Angelo, Lia.

Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Standard Greek transliteration of this surname is Aggelis.
Shortened form of Italian   De Angelis  .

nameMeanings.name: Doukas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Spyros, Anastasios, Aphrodite, Apostolos, Athanasios, Constantine, Costas, Dimitrios, Kalliopi, Kimon, Panagiotis.
Greek: from medieval Greek doukas ‘duke, lord’, from Latin dux. This was the name of a family of imperial rank in medieval Byzantium.

en.lifeSummary: When Andronic Doukas Angelos was born in 1123, in Byzantine Empire, his father, Constantine Angelos, was 30 and his mother, Theodōra Komnēnos, was 27. He married Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa about 1140, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 September 1185, in Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 62, and was buried in Acre, Northern, Palestine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andronic Doukas Angelos est né en 1123, à Empire byzantin, son père, Constantine Angelos, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Theodōra Komnēnos, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa environ 1140, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 septembre 1185, à Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Acre, Northern, Palestine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andronic Doukas Angelos 1123 in Byzantinisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Constantine Angelos 30 und seine Mutter Theodōra Komnēnos 27. Er hat um 1140 in İstanbul, Türkei Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. September 1185 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Heiliges Römisches Reich und wurde in Acre, Northern, Palästina begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andronic Doukas Angelos è nato il nel 1123 nel Impero bizantino, il suo padre, Constantine Angelos, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Theodōra Komnēnos, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa circa 1140, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 settembre 1185, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Acre, Northern, Palestina.

ja.Holy Roman Empire: ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチ
ja.Isreal: ウガンダノースエルンキトグムイスレアル
ja.lifeSummary: Andronic Doukas Angelosが1123年に東ローマ帝国で生まれた時，父Constantine Angelosは30歳，母Theodōra Komnēnosは27歳であった。約1140年にトルコイスタンブルでEuphrosyne Kastamonitissaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1185年9月12日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチで62歳で死去し，パレスチナمنطقة الشمالعكّاにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andronic Doukas Angelos(이)가 1123년 비자틴 피르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Constantine Angelos(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Theodōra Komnēnos(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1140년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1185년 9월 12일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 팔레스타인 منطقة الشمال عكّا에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andronic Doukas Angelos nasceu em 1123, em Império Bizantino, seu pai, Constantine Angelos, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Theodōra Komnēnos, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa aproximadamente 1140, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1185, em Heiliges Römisches Reich, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Acre, Northern, Palestina.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andronic Doukas Angelos родился в 1123 г. в местности Византийская империя, его отцу по имени Constantine Angelos было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Theodōra Komnēnos, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa около 1140 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 сентября 1185 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности عكّا, منطقة الشمال, Палестина.

sm.Aft 1184: ina ua ma'ea e tusa o le 1184

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andronic Doukas Angelos nació en 1123, en Imperio bizantino, su papá, Constantine Angelos, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Theodōra Komnēnos, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa aproximadamente 1140, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1185, en Heiliges Römisches Reich, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Acre, Northern, Palestina.
